name: Brandade De Thon (Tuna)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup each, Swiss and Parmesan cheese, grated
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the dried white beans and garlic in water until tender (about 2 hours).
2. Drain the beans and puree them with a little bean liquid, cream or olive oil, and tuna.
3. Blend until smooth and season to taste with salt.
4. Add the grated Swiss and Parmesan cheeses.
5. Transfer the mixture to a shallow baking dish and spray well.
6. Dot with butter and sprinkle with bread crumbs.
7. Bake at 375°F for 20 minutes or until hot and brown.
